description:
Foundational test-helper changes that the rest of Phase 1B builds on; lands without breaking anything because every change is additive.

## Scope

`tests/common/mod.rs`:

- Per-thread HOME tempdir (`thread_local! TEST_HOME`), allocated lazily on first `bl()` call. Each libtest worker gets its own HOME so concurrent integration tests do not race on a shared XDG state tree. Mirrors the bl-bfa8 / bl-ad4b no-env-mutation pattern (memory: `project_test_global_env_race`).
- `bl(cwd)` and `bl_as(cwd, identity)` set HOME automatically.
- `new_repo()` stands up an empty bare-remote and wires it as `origin` (XDG `bl init` requires `origin`); the bare-remote tempdir is owned by the returned `Repo` so it stays alive.
- `new_repo()` also makes a non-balls empty seed commit on `main` so `git rev-parse HEAD` resolves (matches real-world clone shape).
- Layout-aware path helpers, all computed via `balls::encoding` + `balls::xdg_paths` (no env mutation): `discover_state_repo(repo)`, `discover_tasks_dir(repo)` (used internally), `discover_stealth_tasks(repo)`, `worktree_path(repo, id)`.
- `git_state`, `commit_state_repo`, `push`, `read_task_json`, `read_task_notes` rewired through the new helpers.

Bulk mechanical replacement across ~30 test files:
`<X>.path().join(".balls-worktrees").join(&<id>)` → `worktree_path(<X>.path(), &<id>)`

## Why it can land alone

Legacy `bl init` is unchanged in this slice. The new helpers compute XDG paths but legacy tests never exercise that branch (their bl init produces legacy `.balls-worktrees/<id>/`). `worktree_path` reads through the same encoding the XDG flip will use, so the bulk replacement is a wash today and becomes correct once the flip lands.

## What it does NOT touch

- `cmd_init` / `Store::init` routing — that is sibling `Phase 1B-2`.
- Conformance tests §14.1, §14.4, §14.15, §14.19 — those land with the flip.
- Any test assertion site referencing `.balls/state-repo`, `.balls/config.json`, `.balls/local` — sibling `Phase 1B-4`.

## Source

Existing stash on `work/bl-e802` (`git stash list`) carries the helper code and the bulk worktree_path replacement. Cherry-pick the relevant hunks; do not pull the `store_init_xdg` / `cmd_init` changes into this slice.

## Conformance

None added in this ball — it is foundation. The §14.x gates land with Phase 1B-2.
title: Phase 1B-1: test infra for XDG-mode integration tests
